case_title: CHERI MCCLENDON VS. EPISCOPICAL COMMUNITY CHURCH

docket_entries.description: REQUEST PENDING TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF MCCLENDON, CHERI
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (NO SERVICE FEE INDICATED) SERVED APR-18-2021, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT EPISCOPICAL COMMUNITY CHURCH
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-02-2021 - JUDGMENT.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUL-02-2021 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUL-02-2021 BY MICHELLE TONG. PLAINTIFF CHERI MCCLENDON IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT EPISCOPICAL COMMUNITY CHURCH IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY MCCLENDON, CHERI AS TO DEFENDANT EPISCOPICAL COMMUNITY CHURCH ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-17-2021 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-17-2021 - CONTINUED TO CURE UNTIMELY FILING OF SERVICE TO JUL-02-2021 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF CHERI MCCLENDON IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT EPISCOPICAL COMMUNITY CHURCH IS NOT PRESENT. NO FURTHER SERVICE IS REQUIRED. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MCCLENDON, CHERI IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT EPISCOPICAL COMMUNITY CHURCH STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
REMARK: RETURN MAIL RECD 10/4/21. NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT MALED TO EPISCOPAL COMMUNITY CHURCH-NOT DELIVERABLE AS ADDRESSED/UNABLE TO FORWARD
